description: The ParGroupCollection class can be used to access ParGroups. To access a parGroup you need to use its internal name, which you can obtain by hovering your mouse over the parameter name, and looking at the popup that will come up. See also ParGroup Class. An operator's instance of this can be found in `OP.parGroup`.

members.name: owner
members.description: The OP to which this object belongs.

methods.description: ParGroups may be easily accessed using the [] subscript and assignment operators. *name - Must be an exact string name. Wildcards are not supported. If not found None is returned.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the ParGroupCollection Class wiki page
